title: $NUM_SPACE_CMP_ZERO
text: $NUM_SPACE_CMP_ZERO Determine the result when Uniface compares a numeric space to 0. $NUM_SPACE_CMP_ZERO { = } 1 | 0 Arguments 1 —return TRUE when comparing a numeric operand with a Space (" ") value to zero; default. 0 —return FALSE when comparing a numeric operand with a Space (" ") value to zero. Defaults Assignment file: Any application assignment file Section: [SETTINGS] Default value: 1 Description $NUM_SPACE_CMP_ZERO determines the value that is returned when Uniface compares a space value (" ") in a numeric field to 0. Note: Prior to V6, this setting defaulted to 0 . Example: $NUM_SPACE_CMP_ZERO [SETTINGS] $NUM_SPACE_CMP_ZERO = 1 Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
